zh.lifeSummary: 當Edith Cokayne於1533年出生在英國艾可維丁頓時，她的父親Roger Cockayne37歲，母親Katherine Baddesley38歲。她於大約1545年與William Pigg在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1603年5月1日在英國艾可享年70歲。

nameMeanings.name: Cokayne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cockayne
meanings: English (Midlands and Yorkshire): nickname for a dreamer, from Middle English cokayne ‘cloud-cuckooland’, the name of an imaginary paradise (Old French (pays de) cocaigne, from Middle Low German kōkenje, a diminutive of kōke ‘cake’, since in this land the houses were thought to be made of cake). It may also be a variant of Cocking or from the unflattering Middle English nickname cokin (Old French coquin) ‘disreputable person’.

nameMeanings.name: Edith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English female personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gӯð ‘strife’. This was borne by a daughter ( 961–984 ) of Edgar the Peaceful. (She was named in accordance with the common Old English practice of repeating name elements within a family.) She spent her short life in a convent, and is regarded as a saint.

variants.name: Edythe
meanings: From an Old English female personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gӯð ‘strife’. This was borne by a daughter ( 961–984 ) of Edgar the Peaceful. (She was named in accordance with the common Old English practice of repeating name elements within a family.) She spent her short life in a convent, and is regarded as a saint.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Edith Cokayne was born in 1533, in Widdington, Essex, England, her father, Roger Cockayne, was 37 and her mother, Katherine Baddesley, was 38. She married William Pigg about 1545, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 1 May 1603, in Essex, England, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edith Cokayne est née en 1533, à Widdington, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Roger Cockayne, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Katherine Baddesley, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé William Pigg environ 1545, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 1 mai 1603, à Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edith Cokayne 1533 in Widdington, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Cockayne 37 und ihre Mutter Katherine Baddesley 38. Sie hat um 1545 in Essex, England, United Kingdom William Pigg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. Mai 1603 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Essex, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Edith Cokayne(이)가 1533년 영국 에세스 위딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Cockayne(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Baddesley(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 대략 1545년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 William Pigg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1603년 5월 1일 영국 에세스에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.
